import json, os, re, unicodedata, math, difflib, statistics

import re, unicodedata, math, difflib, statistics, itertools, json, os, sys

ARABIC_DIACRITICS = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
TATWEEL = '\u0640'

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ''
    s = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    s = ARABIC_DIACRITICS.sub('', s)
    # unify Arabic letters variants
    # Hamza forms to alif
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s = s.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')  # maybe drop hamza
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    s = s.replace('ى','ي')
    # standardize allah forms: الله vs اللّه etc (not necessary)
    # Remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]', ' ', s)
    # Collapse whitespace
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

def tokenize(s):
    return normalize_arabic(s).split()

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # a,b are lists of tokens
    # compute LCS length dynamic programming
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev=0
        ai=a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

def token_f1(pred_tokens, ref_tokens):
    pred_set = set(pred_tokens)
    ref_set = set(ref_tokens)
    inter = len(pred_set & ref_set)
    if not pred_set and not ref_set:
        return 1.0
    precision = inter / (len(pred_set) or 1)
    recall = inter / (len(ref_set) or 1)
    if precision + recall == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)

def similarity_score(candidate_text, query_text):
    cand_tokens = tokenize(candidate_text)
    query_tokens = tokenize(query_text)
    # compute LCS normalized by max length
    lcs = lcs_length(cand_tokens, query_tokens)
    maxlen = max(len(cand_tokens), len(query_tokens))
    lcs_norm = lcs / maxlen if maxlen>0 else 0
    f1 = token_f1(cand_tokens, query_tokens)
    # combine
    return 0.6*lcs_norm + 0.4*f1

original_span = "وَلَوْ شاءَ اللَهُ لَأَمَتَّتْهُمْ بِالْفَضْلِ وَاللَكِّ وَلَئِنْ أَمَتَّتْهُمْ بِالْفَضْلِ وَاللَكِّ لَعَجَّلَ لَهُمْ ذَلِكَ وَلَئِنْ أَمَتَّتْهُمْ حَتّى عَضُبَ الرِكَابُ وَالْقَصَصُ يَطُبُّ اللَهُ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَزُلْزِلَتْ طَائِفَةٌ مِنْهُمْ وَاِضطَرَّتْهُمْ حَتّى رَأَوْا مِثْلَ سِقَارِ السَمومِ مِنَ الْعَجَجِ وَلَوْلَا فَضْلُ اللَهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَتُهُ مَا زَكَى مِنْكُمْ مِنْ أَحَدٍ ثُمَّ أَنتُمْ تَزُدُونَ"
snippet = "وَلَوْ شاء... تَزُدُونَ"  # can't use ellipsis
norm_original = normalize_arabic(original_span)
norm_original[:200], len(norm_original.split())

# Build normalized index for quran
for v in quran_data:
    v['ayah_text_norm'] = normalize_arabic(v['ayah_text'])

# find ayat containing "ما زكى منكم من أحد"
query = normalize_arabic("ما زكى منكم من أحد")
matches = [v for v in quran_data if query in v['ayah_text_norm']]
len(matches), [(m['surah_id'], m['ayah_id'], m['ayah_text']) for m in matches[:5]]

candidate = matches[0]['ayah_text']
score = similarity_score(candidate, original_span)
score

# Retrieve 2:155 text
candidates_2_155 = [v for v in quran_data if v['surah_id']==2 and v['ayah_id']==155]
candidates_2_155[0]['ayah_text']

ayah_2_214 = [v for v in quran_data if v['surah_id']==2 and v['ayah_id']==214][0]['ayah_text']
ayah_2_214
[v for v in quran_data if 'وزلزلوا' in v['ayah_text']]
[v for v in quran_data if 'زُلْزِلُوا' in v['ayah_text']]

def normalize_chars(s):
    s2 = s.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    s2 = ARABIC_DIACRITICS.sub('', s2)
    s2 = s2.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','').replace('ة','ه').replace('ى','ي')
    s2 = re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]', ' ', s2)
    s2 = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s2).strip()
    return s2

def lcs_char(a, b):
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev=0
        ai=a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            tmp = dp[j]
            if ai==b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = dp[j] if dp[j]>=dp[j-1] else dp[j-1]
            prev = tmp
    return dp[m]

cand = normalize_chars(candidate)
orig = normalize_chars(original_span)
l= lcs_char(cand, orig)
l/len(cand), l/len(orig), l/ max(len(cand), len(orig))
